creator: Klarna

evidence.text: Klarna reports 2.3 million conversations in the first month, two-thirds of service chats, work equivalent to 700 full-time agents, and customer satisfaction on par with human agents.

relevance_evidence: Early project lead directly documents an organizational learning, adaptation, autonomy, or AI operating mechanism.

title: Klarna AI assistant handles two-thirds of customer service chats in its first month
